rule: hit iff kw>=2 OR sem>=0.7 OR func>=0.7

results.title: G-CADA Adaptive Worker Grouping Distributed SGD
results.reason: Worker subgroup partitioning + scheduling = direct functional twin of GUEDRA's A/B subgroup primitive; sem above 0.7 and func above 0.7.

results.title: OD-SGD One-Step Delay SGD
results.reason: Explicit two-phase parameter-server communication + one-step delay = near-exact match to GUEDRA 2-phase + 1-sub-step staleness.

results.title: Layered SGD: Decentralized Synchronous SGD
results.reason: Structured worker grouping in layered decentralized synchronous SGD; sem and func both above threshold.

results.title: ABS Adaptive Bounded Staleness Async
results.reason: Bounded staleness scheduling = matches GUEDRA bounded 1-sub-step staleness component.

results.title: GAC Gradient Alignment Control Async RL LLM
results.reason: Bounded staleness convergence in async LLM; covers stability of staleness primitive; both above 0.7.

results.title: HALoS Hierarchical Asynchronous Local SGD
results.reason: Hierarchical async local SGD with grouped workers + async comm; same worker-grouping artifact.

results.title: Hiding Communication Cost in Distributed LLM Training
results.reason: Interleaves comm+compute for distributed LLM training = adjacent interleaving primitive; both above 0.7.

results.title: CO2 Full Communication-Computation Overlap
results.reason: Full overlap of communication and computation flattens server stream; aligned with constant-rate goal; both above 0.7.

verdict_sentence: FAIL: all 8 results clear sem>=0.7 and func>=0.7 thresholds (OD-SGD is a near-exact twin of GUEDRA-INTERLEAVE's two-phase + bounded-staleness combo; G-CADA, HALoS, ABS, and Layered SGD redundantly cover worker subgrouping and bounded staleness), so the candidate is not novel.
